problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
team_name: Nyayadarsi: AI-Powered Tender Evaluation and Accountability Engine
summary: Design a technical platform that, given a tender document and a set of bidder submissions, can understand the tender, understand each bidder, evaluate eligibility, and produce explainable evaluation reports.
optimization_claims: Verdicts are reached using an optimized LLM running purely in extractive mode to prevent hallucination
Format Detection: Identifies digital PDFs, scanned images, and structured tables.
Layout-Aware Extraction: We utilize LayoutLMv3 to preserve the spatial relationships of financial tables and technical matrices.
constraints_addressed: Standard OCR converts documents to plain text and destroys table structures
Sophisticated Forgery: A visually perfect, mathematically consistent forged document will pass extraction. We mitigate this through cross-document consistency checks.
Legal Ambiguity: Criteria like 'works of similar complexity' are subjective. Nyayadarsi is programmed to flag these as YELLOW rather than guess, keeping legal authority firmly with the human officer.
